case_title: RICHARD J DI BERNARDO VS. TEGSCO, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, RICHARD J ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
SUMMONS ISSUED ON COMPLAINT TO PLAINTIFF DI BERNARDO, RICHARD J

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-30-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST RICHARD J DI BERNARDO, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-15-2008 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-30-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARIA LERTORA, CSR#11935. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-14-2008 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JO ANN PRIOR, CSR# 9129. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No apperance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Jo Ann Prior, CSR# 9129. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Continued To Oct-14-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/14/2008 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones, CSR#3689. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-14-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Sanctions
